errorPage.notFoundDescription: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
errorPage.defaultDescription: An unexpected error occurred while loading this page.

installationPage.title: Installation
installationPage.description: Install Alixan UI in a Nuxt project. Components are copied directly into your app, so you own the source code and can customize it freely.

createProject.title: Create Project
createProject.description: Start with a Nuxt 4 project. If you already have one, you can skip this step.

addTailwind.title: Add Tailwind CSS
addTailwind.description: Alixan UI components use Tailwind CSS classes and CSS variables for the theme.

backdrop.middle: utility in your Tailwind CSS. Dialog, Drawer, Global Loader and mobile overlays use it for a consistent overlay color:

installComponent.title: Install Component
installComponent.description: Run the CLI from your project root. The component and required utilities will be copied into your project.
installComponent.createdSuffix: . Nuxt auto-import handles the component after it is copied.

useComponent.title: Use Component
useComponent.description: Use the component directly in your Vue templates. No package import is required for the component itself.

homePage.metaDescription: A modern UI component system for Nuxt 4, Vue 3 and TypeScript.
homePage.title: Alixan UI components for Nuxt.
homePage.description: This site is the documentation home for Alixan UI: a clean, minimal and production-ready component system built for Nuxt apps.

copied.title: Copied to your app
copied.description: The CLI installs component source files directly into your Nuxt project.

production.title: Production-ready
production.description: Components are typed, accessible and designed around a consistent visual language.

customize.title: Easy to customize
customize.description: No heavy abstractions. Tailwind classes and CSS variables stay close to the component.

button.description: Displays a button for actions in forms, toolbars and navigation.

iconButton.description: Displays an icon-only button with a required accessible label.

textLink.description: An inline content link for documentation copy, hints and external references without button padding or background styles.

chip.description: A compact interactive token for filters, selections and removable metadata.

accordion.description: A vertical disclosure component for grouped content, inspired by shadcn-vue and adapted for Nuxt auto-import.

demo.accessibleContent: Yes. The trigger uses a native button and exposes aria-expanded for screen readers.
demo.styledContent: Yes. It follows the same clean spacing, rounded corners and muted typography as Alixan UI.
demo.slotsContent: Yes. Use title and content slots when you need custom markup for each item.

tabs.description: A compact segmented navigation component for switching between views.

switch.description: A compact toggle control for boolean settings.

status.description: A soft Cupertino-inspired status pill for success, warning, info and error states.

empty.description: A centered empty state for missing data, empty search results and error pages.

divider.description: A simple horizontal rule for separating groups of content.

table.description: A reusable data table with configurable columns and explicit row value mapping.

input.description: Displays a form input with a floating label, clean states and slots for leading or trailing icons.

otp.description: A small one-time password input inspired by shadcn-vue, simplified for Nuxt auto-import and direct output events.

checkbox.description: A circular iOS-style checkbox for boolean, single-value and multiple-value selection.

select.description: A floating label select with a teleported menu and click-catcher overlay.

search.description: A focused search field with built-in debounce, search icon and clear button.

autocomplete.description: A searchable select input with a teleported list and safe outside click catcher.

calendar.description: A readonly input-style calendar with month and year selects, arrows and quick range presets.

dialog.description: A teleported modal surface for focused decisions and forms.

alertDialog.description: A compact Cupertino-style message dialog for clear blocking feedback.

confirmDialog.description: A focused confirmation dialog with cancel and submit actions.

drawer.description: A teleported panel for secondary flows and mobile-friendly details.

dropdownMenu.description: A teleported popover surface with a slot trigger and fully custom content.

globalLoader.description: A full-screen loading overlay for blocking async flows.

toast.description: A lightweight notification stack for success, warning, error and info messages.

stylesPage.metaDescription: Shared Tailwind tokens and utilities used across Alixan UI documentation.
stylesPage.title: Styles
stylesPage.description: Shared Tailwind tokens and utilities used across examples and overlay components.

tailwind.title: Tailwind CSS
tailwind.description: Copy the shared CSS file from installation when you want the full theme tokens, base styles and utilities in one place.

textSize.title: Text Size
textSize.descriptionSuffix: for compact labels, menu items and dense form controls.

island.title: Island
island.descriptionSuffix: for bordered documentation blocks and compact panels. The radius is calculated from the block size and clamped to the theme radius scale.

backdrop.title: Backdrop
backdrop.description: standardizes overlay dimming for Dialog, Drawer, Global Loader and the mobile sidebar.

seoPage.metaDescription: SEO setup guide for Alixan UI documentation.
seoPage.title: SEO
seoPage.description: Configure shared site metadata, page-level SEO tags, favicon links, robots.txt and sitemap generation for a Nuxt project.

installation.title: Installation
installation.sitemapDescription: Install Nuxt Sitemap before adding sitemap options to nuxt.config.ts.
installation.seoCommandDescription: After copying, replace the example values in site.ts with your own domain, project name, default title, description and OG image.

siteConfig.title: Site Config
siteConfig.description: Keep domain, site name, default title, description and OG image in one config file so Nuxt config and runtime composables use the same values.
siteConfig.nuxtConfigSuffix: for Nuxt SEO modules such as sitemap.

pageMeta.title: Page Meta
pageMeta.description: centralizes title, description, Open Graph and Twitter tags. Pages only pass values that differ from defaults.
pageMeta.usageMiddle: in each page. If a field is omitted, the default from

initialHead.title: Initial Head
initialHead.faviconPrefix: Keep favicon links in a dedicated config file. PNG icons live in
initialHead.faviconSuffix: can stay at the public root.
initialHead.appInit: Initialize default page meta, document language and favicon links once near the app root.

robots.title: Robots
robots.descriptionSuffix: so crawlers can discover your sitemap. Replace the example domain with your production domain.

sitemap.title: Sitemap
sitemap.description: Sitemap helps search robots find available routes and understand which pages should be crawled.
sitemap.verify: After deployment, check that your sitemap is available from the URL used in robots.txt.
sitemap.infoPrefix: For more detailed information, visit the
